name: Campaign Monitor Blog
description: Blog feed for Campaign Monitor covering email marketing, campaigns, automation, and industry insights.

posts.title: How to improve email deliverability and reach more inboxes
posts.summary: You can spend hours crafting the perfect email, nail the subject line, design a beautiful layout. Delivery and inbox placement differ — emails accepted by servers may still miss inboxes.

posts.title: Migrating your Audiences from Mailchimp to Campaign Monitor
posts.summary: Step-by-step guide for switching email platforms. Covers exporting audiences, downloading CSV files, creating lists, and mapping custom fields to maintain subscriber data seamlessly.

posts.title: How email marketing for automotive businesses drives leads and sales
posts.summary: Examines how car dealerships leverage email to convert online research into test drives. Discusses promotional campaigns, transactional reminders, inventory alerts, and re-engagement strategies.

posts.title: Announcing a Change of Company Details to Your Customers
posts.summary: Comprehensive guide with templates for rebrandings, mergers, and address changes. Emphasizes clarity in subject lines, reassuring messaging, and multi-touch communication strategies.

posts.title: Best AI Marketing Tools for 2026
posts.summary: Reviews 16+ AI platforms spanning email, content creation, SMS, automation, and analytics — with pricing, use cases, and feature comparisons.
